reasoning: XLK (tech) +1.5% is outperforming SPY +0.8%, showing strong tech leadership and growth momentum heading into the day. However, XLF (financials) at -0.41% signals weakness in the broad base — this is a narrow, tech-led rally rather than broad-based strength. XLE +0.49% is neutral. Premarket ribbon is BULL stack with 65c spread. Bias is bullish on tech outperformance, but sector divergence (tech up / financials down) limits confidence to medium. Watch for XLF recovery to confirm broad-based upside; if XLF stays weak, tech rally may face selling pressure at resistance.
key_observations: XLK: +1.5% — tech/growth leadership, outperforming SPY by 0.7pp
